comment.text: This key displays the text "User limit" in the Link Settings Panel. It's used as a label to indicate the presence or absence of a user limit setting, likely associated with a toggle button. Translators should ensure the translation accurately conveys the concept of a user restriction.

usage.context:
<Text
 fontSize="16px"
 fontWeight={700}
 className={styles.linkSettingsText}
 >
 {t("Common:UserLimit")}
 </Text>
 <ToggleButton
 className={styles.linkSettingsToggle}
 isChecked={userLimitIsChecked}
 onChange={() => setUserLimitIsChecked(!userLimitIsChecked)}
